contentBlocks.original:
नित्यानन्दकरी वराभयकरी सौन्दर्यरत्नाकरी
निर्धूताखिलघोरपावनकरी प्रत्यक्षमाहेश्वरी ।
प्रालेयाचलवंशपावनकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ १॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nityānandakarī varābhayakarī saundaryaratnākarī
nirdhūtākhilaghorapāvanakarī pratyakṣamāheśvarī .
prāleyācalavaṃśapāvanakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 1..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! renderer of the support of compassion, the bestower of eternal happiness, the donor of gifts and protection, the ocean of beauty, the destroyer of all sins and purifier, the great goddess, the purifier of the family of Himavan, and the great deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: नित्यानन्दकरी (nityānandakarī) – bestower of eternal happiness (nitya:eternal | ānanda:happiness | karī:bestower); वराभयकरी (varābhayakarī) – bestower of boons and protection (vara:boon | abhaya:protection | karī:bestower); सौन्दर्यरत्नाकरी (saundaryaratnākari) – ocean of beauty (saundarya:beauty | ratna:gem | ākarī:ocean); निर्धूताखिलघोरपावनकरी (nirdhūtākhilaghorapāvanakarī) – purifier of all sins (nirdhūta:destroyed | akhila:all | ghora:terrible | pāvana:purifier | karī:doer); प्रत्यक्षमाहेश्वरी (pratyakṣamāheśvarī) – manifest great goddess (pratyakṣa:manifest | māheśvarī:great goddess); प्रालेयाचलवंशपावनकरी (prāleyācalavaṃśapāvanakarī) – purifier of Himavan's lineage (prāleya:Himavan | acala:mountain | vaṃśa:lineage | pāvana:purifier | karī:doer); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – great deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:great deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:doer); माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī) – Mother Annapurna (mātā:mother | annapūrṇa:Annapurna | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
नानारत्नविचित्रभूषणकरी हेमाम्बराडम्बरी
मुक्ताहारविलम्बमान विलसत् वक्षोजकुम्भान्तरी ।
काश्मीरागरुवासिता रुचिकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ २॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nānāratnavicitrabhūṣaṇakarī hemāmbarāḍambarī
muktāhāravilambamāna vilasat vakṣojakumbhāntarī .
kāśmīrāgaruvāsitā rucikarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 2..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! renderer of the support of compassion, one who is adorned with ornaments made up of different kinds of gems, wearer of golden-laced dress, the space, in between whose breasts shines with the pendant garland of pearls, the beautiful - bodied, rendered and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: नानारत्नविचित्रभूषणकरी (nānāratnavicitrabhūṣaṇakarī) – adorned with various gem ornaments (nānā:various | ratna:gems | vicitra:varied | bhūṣaṇa:ornaments | karī:making); हेमाम्बराडम्बरी (hemāmbarāḍambarī) – wearer of golden-laced dress (hema:gold | ambara:dress | āḍambarī:wearer); मुक्ताहारविलम्बमान (muktāhāravilambamāna) – with pendant garland of pearls (muktā:pearls | hāra:garland | vilambamāna:pendant); विलसत् (vilasat) – shines; वक्षोजकुम्भान्तरी (vakṣojakumbhāntarī) – space between breasts (vakṣoja:breasts | kumbha:pot | antarī:space between); काश्मीरागरुवासिता (kāśmīrāgaruvāsitā) – scented with Kashmir aloe (kāśmīra:Kashmir | aguru:aloe | vāsitā:scented); रुचिकरी (rucikarī) – beautiful-bodied (ruci:beauty | karī:making); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:making); माता (mātā) – mother; अन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (annapūrṇeśvarī) – Annapurna, goddess of food (anna:food | pūrṇa:full | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
योगानन्दकरी रिपुक्षयकरी धर्मार्थनिष्ठाकरी
चन्द्रार्कानलभासमानलहरी त्रैलोक्यरक्षाकरी ।
सर्वैश्वर्यसमस्तवाञ्छितकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ ३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yogānandakarī ripukṣayakarī dharmārthaniṣṭhākarī
candrārkānalabhāsamānalaharī trailokyarakṣākarī .
sarvaiśvaryasamastavāñchitakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 3..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! the renderer of the support of compassion, the giver of happiness obtainable through yoga, the destroyer of the enemies, the cause of (men) getting deep-rooted in righteousness, the possessor of the waves of splendour of the three worlds, the donors of all riches, the bestower of the fruits of penance, and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: योगानन्दकरी (yogānandakarī) – giver of happiness through yoga (yoga:yoga | ānanda:happiness | karī:giver); रिपुक्षयकरी (ripukṣayakarī) – destroyer of enemies (ripu:enemies | kṣaya:destruction | karī:doer); धर्मार्थनिष्ठाकरी (dharmārthaniṣṭhākarī) – cause of righteousness (dharma:righteousness | artha:purpose | niṣṭhā:steadfastness | karī:doer); चन्द्रार्कानलभासमानलहरी (candrārkānalabhāsamānalaharī) – waves of splendour (candra:moon | arka:sun | anala:fire | bhāsa:splendour | māna:like | laharī:waves); त्रैलोक्यरक्षाकरी (trailokyarakṣākarī) – protector of three worlds (trai:three | lokya:worlds | rakṣā:protection | karī:doer); सर्वैश्वर्यसमस्तवाञ्छितकरी (sarvaiśvaryasamastavāñchitakarī) – giver of all riches (sarva:all | aiśvarya:riches | samasta:entire | vāñchita:desired | karī:giver); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:doer); माता (mātā) – mother; अन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (annapūrṇeśvarī) – Annapurna, goddess of food (anna:food | pūrṇa:full | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
कैलासाचलकन्दरालयकरी गौरी उमा शङ्करी
कौमारी निगमार्थगोचरकरी ओङ्कारबीजाक्षरी ।
मोक्षद्वारकपाटपाटनकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ ४॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kailāsācalakandarālayakarī gaurī umā śaṅkarī
kaumārī nigamārthagocarakarī oṅkārabījākṣarī .
mokṣadvārakapāṭapāṭanakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 4..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! the renderer of the support of compassion, the resident of the caves of the Kailasa mountains, golden-complexioned, Oh! Uma! the consort of Sankara, endowed always with maidenhood, the cause of our comprehension of the purport of the Vedas, whose basic syllable is the syllable `Om', the opener of the doors of emancipation and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: कैलासाचलकन्दरालयकरी (kailāsācalakandarālayakarī) – resident of Kailasa caves (kailāsa:Kailasa | acala:mountain | kandara:cave | ālaya:residence | karī:making); गौरी (gaurī) – Gauri; उमा (umā) – Uma; शङ्करी (śaṅkarī) – consort of Sankara; कौमारी (kaumārī) – endowed with maidenhood; निगमार्थगोचरकरी (nigamārthagocarakarī) – cause of Vedas' comprehension (nigama:Vedas | artha:meaning | gocara:comprehension | karī:making); ओङ्कारबीजाक्षरी (oṅkārabījākṣarī) – whose syllable is Om (oṅkāra:Om | bīja:seed | akṣarī:syllable); मोक्षद्वारकपाटपाटनकरी (mokṣadvārakapāṭapāṭanakarī) – opener of emancipation doors (mokṣa:emancipation | dvāra:door | kapāṭa:gate | pāṭana:opening | karī:making); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:making); माता (mātā) – mother; अन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (annapūrṇeśvarī) – Annapurna, goddess of food (anna:food | pūrṇa:full | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
दृश्यादृश्य विभूतिवाहनकरी ब्रह्माण्डभाण्डोदरी
लीलानाटकसूत्रभेदनकरी विज्ञानदीपाङ्कुरी ।
श्रीविश्वेशमनः प्रसादनकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ ५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dṛśyādṛśya vibhūtivāhanakarī brahmāṇḍabhāṇḍodarī
līlānāṭakasūtrabhedanakarī vijñānadīpāṅkurī .
śrīviśveśamanaḥ prasādanakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 5..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! the renderer of the support of compassion, the conveyor of the visible and invisible prosperity, the container of the primordial egg, the directress of the sportive drama (of the world), the flame of the lamp of true knowledge, the source of the mental happiness of Sri Visvanatha, and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: दृश्यादृश्य (dṛśyādṛśya) – visible and invisible (dṛśya:visible | adṛśya:invisible); विभूतिवाहनकरी (vibhūtivāhanakarī) – conveyor of prosperity (vibhūti:prosperity | vāhana:conveyor | karī:doer); ब्रह्माण्डभाण्डोदरी (brahmāṇḍabhāṇḍodarī) – container of the primordial egg (brahmāṇḍa:primordial egg | bhāṇḍa:container | udarī:belly); लीलानाटकसूत्रभेदनकरी (līlānāṭakasūtrabhedanakarī) – directress of the sportive drama (līlā:sportive | nāṭaka:drama | sūtra:thread | bhedana:breaking | karī:doer); विज्ञानदीपाङ्कुरी (vijñānadīpāṅkurī) – flame of true knowledge (vijñāna:true knowledge | dīpa:lamp | aṅkurī:flame); श्रीविश्वेशमनः (śrīviśveśamanaḥ) – mental happiness of Sri Visvanatha (śrī:Sri | viśveśa:Visvanatha | manaḥ:mind); प्रसादनकरी (prasādanakarī) – source of happiness (prasādana:happiness | karī:doer); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:doer); माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī) – Mother Annapurna (mātā:mother | annapūrṇa:Annapurna | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
उर्वी सर्वजनेश्वरी भगवती माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी
वेणीनीलसमानकुन्तलधरी नित्यान्नदानेश्वरी ।
सर्वानन्दकरी सदाशुभकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ ६॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
urvī sarvajaneśvarī bhagavatī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī
veṇīnīlasamānakuntaladharī nityānnadāneśvarī .
sarvānandakarī sadāśubhakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 6..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! the renderer of the support of compassion, the form of the earth, the governess of all men, the cause of victory, the mother, the ocean of compassion, the possessor of beautiful and dark braid of hari resembling the flower of the indigo plant, the giver of food daily, the direct bestower of emancipation and eternal welfare, and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: उर्वी (urvī) – earth; सर्वजनेश्वरी (sarvajaneśvarī) – governess of all men (sarva:all | jana:men | īśvarī:governess); भगवती (bhagavatī) – goddess; माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī) – Mother Annapurna (mātā:mother | annapūrṇa:Annapurna | īśvarī:goddess); वेणीनीलसमानकुन्तलधरी (veṇīnīlasamānakuntaladharī) – possessor of dark braid (veṇī:braid | nīla:dark | samāna:similar | kuntala:hair | dharī:possessor); नित्यान्नदानेश्वरी (nityānnadāneśvarī) – giver of food daily (nitya:daily | anna:food | dāna:giving | īśvarī:goddess); सर्वानन्दकरी (sarvānandakarī) – giver of all joy (sarva:all | ānanda:joy | karī:giver); सदाशुभकरी (sadāśubhakarī) – always auspicious (sadā:always | śubha:auspicious | karī:maker); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:maker); माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī) – Mother Annapurna (mātā:mother | annapūrṇa:Annapurna | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
आदिक्षान्तसमस्तवर्णनकरी शम्भोस्त्रिभावाकरी
काश्मीरा त्रिजलेश्वरी त्रिलहरी नित्याङ्कुरा शर्वरी ।
कामाकाङ्क्षकरी जनोदयकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ ७॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ādikṣāntasamastavarṇanakarī śambhostribhāvākarī
kāśmīrā trijaleśvarī trilaharī nityāṅkurā śarvarī .
kāmākāṅkṣakarī janodayakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 7..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! the renderer of the support of compassion, the maker of the letters 'a' (‚) to 'ksha' (®¸), he cause of the three acts of Sambhu, namely, the creation, protection and destruction, the wearer of saffron, the consort of the destroyer of the three cities, the consort of the three-eyed lord, the governess of universe, the form of the goddess of night, the opener of the gates of heavens, and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: आदिक्षान्तसमस्तवर्णनकरी (ādikṣāntasamastavarṇanakarī) – maker of all letters (ādi:beginning | kṣānta:ending | samasta:all | varṇana:letters | karī:maker); शम्भोः (śambhoḥ) – of Śambhu; त्रिभावाकरी (tribhāvākarī) – cause of three acts (tri:three | bhāva:acts | karī:cause); काश्मीरा (kāśmīrā) – wearer of saffron; त्रिजलेश्वरी (trijaleśvarī) – consort of three-eyed lord (tri:three | jala:water | īśvarī:goddess); त्रिलहरी (trilaharī) – governess of universe (tri:three | laharī:waves); नित्याङ्कुरा (nityāṅkurā) – eternal sprout (nitya:eternal | aṅkurā:sprout); शर्वरी (śarvarī) – goddess of night; कामाकाङ्क्षकरी (kāmākāṅkṣakarī) – fulfiller of desires (kāma:desire | ākāṅkṣa:wish | karī:fulfiller); जनोदयकरी (janodayakarī) – bringer of people's rise (jana:people | udaya:rise | karī:bringer); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kāśī (kāśī:Kāśī | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:maker); माता (mātā) – mother; अन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (annapūrṇeśvarī) – Annapurna, goddess of food (anna:food | pūrṇa:full | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
देवी सर्वविचित्ररत्नरचिता दाक्षायणी सुन्दरी
वामे स्वादुपयोधरा प्रियकरी सौभाग्य माहेश्वरी ।
भक्ताभीष्टकरी सदाशुभकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ ८॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
devī sarvavicitraratnaracitā dākṣāyaṇī sundarī
vāme svādupayodharā priyakarī saubhāgya māheśvarī .
bhaktābhīṣṭakarī sadāśubhakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 8..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! the renderer of the support of compassion, Oh! Goddess! adorned with different kinds of gems, the daughter of Daksha, the most beautiful, bearer of benign breasts, doer of good to all, endowed with good fortune, fulfiller of the desires of the devotees, doer of auspicious acts, and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: देवी (devī) – goddess; सर्वविचित्ररत्नरचिता (sarvavicitraratnaracitā) – adorned with various gems (sarva:all | vicitra:various | ratna:gems | racitā:adorned); दाक्षायणी (dākṣāyaṇī) – daughter of Daksha; सुन्दरी (sundarī) – beautiful; वामे (vāme) – on the left; स्वादुपयोधरा (svādupayodharā) – bearer of sweet breasts (svādu:sweet | payodharā:breasts); प्रियकरी (priyakarī) – doer of good (priya:dear | karī:doer); सौभाग्य (saubhāgya) – good fortune; माहेश्वरी (māheśvarī) – consort of Shiva; भक्ताभीष्टकरी (bhaktābhīṣṭakarī) – fulfiller of devotees' desires (bhakta:devotee | abhīṣṭa:desires | karī:fulfiller); सदाशुभकरी (sadāśubhakarī) – doer of auspicious acts (sadā:always | śubha:auspicious | karī:doer); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – supporter of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:doer); माता (mātā) – mother; अन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (annapūrṇeśvarī) – Goddess Annapurna (anna:food | pūrṇa:full | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
चन्द्रार्कानलकोटिकोटिसदृशा चन्द्रांशुबिम्बाधरी
चन्द्रार्काग्निसमानकुण्डलधरी चन्द्रार्कवर्णेश्वरी ।
मालापुस्तकपाशसाङ्कुशधरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ ९॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
candrārkānalakoṭikoṭisadṛśā candrāṃśubimbādharī
candrārkāgnisamānakuṇḍaladharī candrārkavarṇeśvarī .
mālāpustakapāśasāṅkuśadharī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 9..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! the renderer of the support of compassion, one who resembles crores and crores of suns, moons and fires, endowed with lips resembling the red pearl and the bimba fruit, bearer of ear-ornament resembling the moon, sun and fire (in radiance), having a complexion of the goad, and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: चन्द्रार्कानलकोटिकोटिसदृशा (candrārkānalakoṭikoṭisadṛśā) – resembling crores of suns, moons, fires (candra:moon | arka:sun | anala:fire | koṭi:crore | koṭi:crore | sadṛśā:resembling); चन्द्रांशुबिम्बाधरी (candrāṃśubimbādharī) – endowed with moon-like lips (candra:moon | aṃśu:ray | bimba:sphere | adharī:endowed with lips); चन्द्रार्काग्निसमानकुण्डलधरी (candrārkāgnisamānakuṇḍaladharī) – bearer of radiant ear-ornament (candra:moon | arka:sun | agni:fire | samāna:equal | kuṇḍala:ear-ornament | dharī:bearer); चन्द्रार्कवर्णेश्वरी (candrārkavarṇeśvarī) – presiding deity of moon, sun (candra:moon | arka:sun | varṇa:color | īśvarī:presiding deity); मालापुस्तकपाशसाङ्कुशधरी (mālāpustakapāśasāṅkuśadharī) – bearer of garland, book, noose, goad (mālā:garland | pustaka:book | pāśa:noose | sāṅkuśa:goad | dharī:bearer); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding deity); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:one who does); माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī) – Mother Annapurna (mātā:mother | annapūrṇa:Annapurna | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
क्षत्रत्राणकरी महाऽभयकरी माता कृपासागरी
साक्षान्मोक्षकरी सदा शिवकरी विश्वेश्वरी श्रीधरी ।
दक्षाक्रन्दकरी निरामयकरी काशीपुराधीश्वरी
भिक्षां देहि कृपावलम्बनकरी माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी ॥ १०॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kṣatratrāṇakarī mahā'bhayakarī mātā kṛpāsāgarī
sākṣānmokṣakarī sadā śivakarī viśveśvarī śrīdharī .
dakṣākrandakarī nirāmayakarī kāśīpurādhīśvarī
bhikṣāṃ dehi kṛpāvalambanakarī mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī .. 10..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Mother Annapurna! the renderer of the support of compassion, the protector of the dominion remover of great fear, the mother, the ocean of compassion, the cause of the happiness of all, the eternal doer of good, the consort of Visvesvara, the form of Lakshmi, the destroyer of the sacrifice of Daksha, one who makes us free from diseases, and the presiding deity of Kasi, (thou) grant us alms.
contentBlocks.meanings: क्षत्रत्राणकरी (kṣatratrāṇakarī) – protector of dominion (kṣatra:dominion | trāṇa:protection | karī:doer); महाऽभयकरी (mahā'bhayakarī) – remover of great fear (mahā:great | abhaya:fearlessness | karī:doer); माता (mātā) – mother; कृपासागरी (kṛpāsāgarī) – ocean of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | sāgarī:ocean); साक्षान्मोक्षकरी (sākṣānmokṣakarī) – direct giver of liberation (sākṣāt:direct | mokṣa:liberation | karī:doer); सदा (sadā) – always; शिवकरी (śivakarī) – doer of good (śiva:good | karī:doer); विश्वेश्वरी (viśveśvarī) – consort of Visvesvara (viśva:universe | īśvarī:goddess); श्रीधरी (śrīdharī) – form of Lakshmi (śrī:Lakshmi | dharī:holder); दक्षाक्रन्दकरी (dakṣākrandakarī) – destroyer of Daksha's sacrifice (dakṣa:Daksha | ākranda:lamentation | karī:doer); निरामयकरी (nirāmayakarī) – remover of diseases (nirāmaya:disease-free | karī:doer); काशीपुराधीश्वरी (kāśīpurādhīśvarī) – presiding deity of Kasi (kāśī:Kasi | pura:city | adhīśvarī:presiding goddess); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; कृपावलम्बनकरी (kṛpāvalambanakarī) – support of compassion (kṛpā:compassion | avalambana:support | karī:doer); माताऽन्नपूर्णेश्वरी (mātā'nnapūrṇeśvarī) – Mother Annapurna (mātā:mother | annapūrṇa:Annapurna | īśvarī:goddess);

contentBlocks.original:
अन्नपूर्णे सदापूर्णे
शङ्करप्राणवल्लभे ।
ज्ञानवैराग्यसिद्ध्यर्थं
भिक्षां देहि च पार्वति ॥ ११॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
annapūrṇe sadāpūrṇe
śaṅkaraprāṇavallabhe .
jñānavairāgyasiddhyarthaṃ
bhikṣāṃ dehi ca pārvati .. 11..
contentBlocks.translation: Oh! Parvati! Annapurna! always full, the dear consort of Sankara, grant us alms for the sake of securing knowledge and detachment.
contentBlocks.meanings: अन्नपूर्णे (annapūrṇe) – Oh Annapurna (anna:food | pūrṇe:full); सदापूर्णे (sadāpūrṇe) – always full (sadā:always | pūrṇe:full); शङ्करप्राणवल्लभे (śaṅkaraprāṇavallabhe) – dear consort of Sankara (śaṅkara:Sankara | prāṇa:life | vallabhe:dear consort); ज्ञानवैराग्यसिद्ध्यर्थं (jñānavairāgyasiddhyarthaṃ) – for knowledge and detachment (jñāna:knowledge | vairāgya:detachment | siddhi:attainment | arthaṃ:for the sake of); भिक्षां (bhikṣāṃ) – alms; देहि (dehi) – grant; च (ca) – and; पार्वति (pārvati) – Oh Parvati;

contentBlocks.original:
माता च पार्वती देवी
पिता देवो महेश्वरः ।
बान्धवाः शिवभक्ताश्च
स्वदेशो भुवनत्रयम् ॥ १२॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mātā ca pārvatī devī
pitā devo maheśvaraḥ .
bāndhavāḥ śivabhaktāśca
svadeśo bhuvanatrayam .. 12..
contentBlocks.translation: Goddess Parvati is my Mother, Lord Mahesvara is my Father, the devotees of Lord Siva are my relatives; and the three worlds are my own country.
contentBlocks.meanings: माता (mātā) – mother; च (ca) – and; पार्वती (pārvatī) – Parvati; देवी (devī) – goddess; पिता (pitā) – father; देवः (devaḥ) – god; महेश्वरः (maheśvaraḥ) – Mahesvara; बान्धवाः (bāndhavāḥ) – relatives; शिवभक्ताः (śivabhaktāḥ) – devotees of Shiva (śiva:Shiva | bhaktāḥ:devotees); च (ca) – and; स्वदेशः (svadeśaḥ) – own country (sva:own | deśaḥ:country); भुवनत्रयम् (bhuvanatrayam) – three worlds (bhuvana:world | trayam:three);
